_correction.by: Claude Code task-015 entity-architecture correction + stub-to-full implementation (preparation for PR 3 W1 task 024)
_correction.reason: Stub replaced with full implementation per R4 spec FR-8. Surfaces recent sprk_event activity on user's matters (general activity stream, all event types). Uses Spaarke custom sprk_event entity (NOT OOB tasks/appointments).
_correction.previousState: 1-node stub (createNotification only, no query, no membership)
_correction.correctedState: Full graph: Start -> LookupUserMembership -> Query sprk_event (membership-scope union) -> Condition -> CreateNotification per FR-8 + AC-5b

playbook.name: Matter/Project Activity Summary
playbook.description: Notifies users of recent sprk_event activity on their matters and projects since last check (all event types — Action, Deadline, Meeting, Milestone, Reminder, Notification, Status Change, Approval). Uses Spaarke custom sprk_event entity. Surfaces general activity stream, distinct from the type-specific PB-019 (new-events) playbook.

timeWindow.description: How far back to look for matter activity

configJson.description: Scoped to current user's matters via LookupUserMembership
Resolve the executing user's matter memberships per ADR-034. Bound to `myMatters.ids` for downstream filtering.

configJson.fetchXml: <fetch top="50"><entity name="sprk_event"><attribute name="sprk_eventname"/><attribute name="sprk_eventid"/><attribute name="sprk_eventtype_ref"/><attribute name="statuscode"/><attribute name="createdon"/><attribute name="modifiedon"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingrecordname"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingrecordurl"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingmatter"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingproject"/><attribute name="ownerid"/><link-entity name="sprk_matter" from="sprk_matterid" to="sprk_regardingmatter" link-type="outer" alias="m"><attribute name="sprk_mattername"/><attribute name="sprk_matternumber"/><attribute name="ownerid"/></link-entity><filter type="and"><condition attribute="modifiedon" operator="last-x-hours" value="{{timeWindowHours}}"/><filter type="or"><condition attribute="sprk_regardingmatter" operator="in" value="{{joinIds myMatters.ids}}"/><condition entityname="m" attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/><condition attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/></filter></filter><order attribute="modifiedon" descending="true"/></entity></fetch>
configJson.description: Recent sprk_event activity on user's matters (all event types). Membership-scope union: (a) sprk_regardingmatter IN myMatters.ids OR (b) record-owner OR (c) matter-owner = current user. Sort: modifiedon desc.
Check if any matter activity was found

configJson.title: {{matterActivityQuery.output.count}} recent activity item(s) on your matters
